summary: Research completed via GitHub API accessed through Playwright browser. Found 72 bounty-labeled issues in last 7 days. GitHub token returns 401 when used via Node.js but API works via browser GET without auth. Also found trending repos updated today.

items.title: $500 Bounty: Fake a Verified Post
items.description: Challenge to post a message with a green verified badge on agentcaptcha.chat without running real model inference on CommitLLM-compatible GPU
items.whatTheyNeed: Creative bypass / social engineering approach to fake verified badge
items.howToReach: Open GitHub issue, respond with solution

items.title: Bounty: FV Standalone Flow — Differentiate first-time vs. reverify intro screens
items.description: Refactor standalone face-verification intro flow, separate first-time vs reverify screens

items.title: [BOUNTY] Claim: Travel Price Tracker — $50
items.description: Python + Playwright service tracking real-time flight/hotel prices from Google Flights
items.howToReach: Comment on issue claiming the bounty

items.title: Tokenised market-maker shares: ERC-4626 vault per agent, fees → share holders
items.description: Build tokenised vault system for blockchain agent market-making
items.expectedBudget: Not specified - likely meaningful for DeFi project

items.title: [Tutorial] Building an Unshielded Token dApp with UI
items.description: Tutorial for building unshielded token dApp with working frontend
items.howToReach: Respond on GitHub issue, submit content

items.title: [Tutorial] Shielded Token Operations: Mint, Transfer & Burn with Test Suite
items.description: Walk through shielded token lifecycle in Compact with compilable code

items.title: Bounty: Tier S defectors identified (v0.1.0)
items.description: On-chain data analysis - identifying defectors in token system

items.title: Optimize GitHub Issue Polling Interval
items.description: Analyze and optimize polling interval in scanner.js for dynamic polling strategy

items.title: Enhance Logging for AI Judge Module
items.description: Improve logging in judge.js with timestamps, error details, review metrics

items.title: add a python version of the kit
items.description: Port existing kit to Python (Fuel blockchain agent kit)
